title: GetPublicKeyCertificateOutput
description: GetPublicKeyCertificateOutput schema from Amazon Payment Cryptography

allOf.description: The public key component of the asymmetric key pair in a certificate (PEM) format. It is signed by the root certificate authority (CA) within your service account. The certificate expires in 90 days.
The certificate chain that signed the public key certificate of the asymmetric key pair. This is the root certificate authority (CA) within your service account.
